item.description:

ℹ️:

  • La scatola misura circa 7,6 x 12,7 x 3,8 cm
  • Un accessorio divertente da avere su una scrivania o sala giochi
  • Scatola di 224 fogli di note assomiglia a mattoncini LEGO impilati
  • Ogni foglio colorato ha un design a mattoni su un lato

item.title: Solutions 2 Go - LEGO Horizon Adventures Nintendo Switch
item.description:
There’s a deal Solutions 2 Go - LEGO Horizon Adventures Nintendo Switch here:

ℹ️:

  • Customize your home and your characters
  • Experience thrilling online and couch co-op action with friends and family
  • Explore the much-loved world of Horizon and come face-to-face with the game’s awe-inspiring machines – all faithfully recreated in LEGO bricks.
  • Engage in explosive combat with spectacular weapons, power-ups, and gadgets.
  • Enjoy an exciting mix of action, exploration, customization and laugh-out-loud LEGO humor.

🛒 Buy it now!!

item.title: LEGO Minifigure Photography Klutz
item.description:
You’ve got LEGO Minifigure Photography Klutz at the following link:

ℹ️:

  • Become a famous photographer with LEGO minifigures as your star models
  • Includes two LEGO minifigures, LEGO props, printed backgrounds and punch-outs, plus a full-color 64-page book with stunning photo inspiration and how-to
  • Learn tricks of perspective, scale, angles and lighting to make the minifigures world come to life

item.description:

item.title: Warner Bros - LEGO Worlds Nintendo Switch
item.description:
There’s a deal Warner Bros - LEGO Worlds Nintendo Switch here:

ℹ️:

  • Uncover hidden treasures in environments that range from the fun to the fantastical.
  • International products have separate terms, are sold from abroad and may differ from local products, including fit, age ratings, and language of product, labeling or instructions.
  • Race, soar, zoom, and ride on a variety of vehicles and creatures from diggers and helicopters to horses and dragons Create and Customise your own LEGO World.
  • Make your worlds come to life with customisable characters, both friendly and fearsome.

🛒 Buy it now!!
